name: Nyx Prime
description: Infiltrate the minds of your enemies with Nyx Prime. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Nyx gains +|CRITICAL|% Critical Chance on Primary and Secondary weapons per Confused enemy within <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range, up to +|MAX|%.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.description: Nyx seizes control of a target's mind, compelling them to fight for the Tenno cause. Controlled enemies have increased <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status Chance. When Nyx shoots them, they also have an increased Damage Multiplier.

abilities.name: Psychic Bolts
abilities.description: Nyx unleashes a volley of psychic bolts that track and strike nearby enemies with telekinetic precision. When enemies are slain, additional bolts scatter to new targets. Striking foes weakens their defenses and transfers a portion to Nyx.

abilities.name: Chaos
abilities.description: Nyx releases a devastating psychic pulse, disorienting enemies in a wide radius and forcing them to turn on each other. Confused foes lash out at random factions.

abilities.name: Absorb
abilities.description: Nyx draws in and contains the damage dealt to her and the damage confused enemies deal to each other then converts it into a devastating radial blast. Following the blast, she enters a brief invulnerable state and gains a Weapon Damage boost proportional to the absorbed damage.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Infiltrate the minds of your enemies with Nyx Prime. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Nyx Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Nyx Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Nyx Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Archon Hunt enemies applying enemy defense buffs in a different way than Sorties, causing abilities (for example, but not limited to) Nyx’s Psychic Bolts to not strip 100% of an enemy’s Shields or Armor even with the right Mods applied. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1325375-nyx-psychic-bolts/?ct=1666206012

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Psychic Bolts (with 125%+ Ability Strength) not removing all Shields from Steel Path enemies.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nyx being able to Mind Control stationary turrets in the Plains of Eidolon and the Orb Vallis, causing them to teleport to her when she gets far enough away. 
Fixed Nyx’s Psychic Bolts not removing enemy defenses or stunning them if the Pacifying Bolts Augment mod is equipped. 
Fixed bug where hopping on K-Drive with Nyx Absorb active causing her to be ragdolled off.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Nyx's Mind Control

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sister of Pavos Hounds becoming permanent allies (and blocking progression) if affected by abilities like Nyx’s Mind Control or Revenant’s Enthrall.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.changes:
Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Rhino Prime & Nyx Prime, Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Nyx Prime’s Relics are however still available through Corpus Railjack missions.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.11
patchlogs.changes: Regal Aya is no longer purchasable from Varzia and Aya has been removed from the drop tables and replaced with Nyx Prime and Rhino Prime Relics.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mind Controlling a Thrall as Nyx preventing it from being killed by a melee finisher.

patchlogs.name: Prime Resurgence: Hotfix 30.9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to roll while using Nyx’s Assimilate Augment on controller or a custom roll keybind.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.changes:
Nyx’s Assimilate Augment now allows you to roll, similar to Mesa’s Waltz!
Nyx’s Absorb stat screen now shows max explosion radius value.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino Prime returns alongside his Prime Weapons and exclusive Customizations for a limited time. With Nyx Prime already available to earn through Void Storm Missions, there are now even more opportunities to obtain this deadly psychic Warframe and her Prime Accessories.
Rhino Prime, Nyx Prime, Ankyros Prime, Boltor Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Zephyr and Chroma Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Nyx Prime
Rhino & Nyx Prime Glyphs
Nyx Prime
Improved the Hound Reflex Denial Precept to be more similar to Nyx’s Absorb and capped the Damage per burst that can be directed back at you by Enemy Hounds; preventing self-damage or friendly fire. This also fixes player Hounds not redirecting the full amount of player Damage, only base.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes:
Nyx Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime Relics
We’ve permanently Unvaulted Nyx/Valkyr Prime and their accompanying Prime weapons in Corpus Railjack! Find their Relics in new Corpus Railjack Derelict Freightlinkers, Ice Mines, and Orokin Shield Derelicts! As well as in Grineer Point of Interest rewards!

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Nyx’s Psychic Bolts ability.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Well of Life also no longer increases the Health of the target (this was an old solution to prevent other players from killing the target too fast). Instead it now uses a more modern approach similar to Nyx’s Mind Control where the Damage gets stored and dealt at the end of the Ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes towards Defense missions breaking due to an inability to terminate enemies that have been changed to Ally status (Nyx Mind Control, Revenant Enthrall, etc), thus inability to complete the Defense Wave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Banshee, Excalibur Umbra, Frost, Nekros, Nova, Nyx, Saryn, Valkyr, and Zephyr Ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals!

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Nyx: 15 to 100
Nyx Prime: 50 to 125

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.4 + 26.0.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Nyx’s Psychic Bolts infested movement speed debuff is now affected by Power Strength.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Combat Discipline Mod killing Warframes that are invincible (Nyx’s Absorb etc).

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to complete the Kuva Fortress Defense mission if you Nyx Mind Control a turret.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.3 + 25.7.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Nyx and Rhino Prime, as well as their signature Prime Weapons, Accessories, has entered the Prime Vault and have been removed from the drop tables.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Absorb consuming more than its base of 4 Energy per second even when not being attacked.

patchlogs.name: Augment Tweaks: Update 25.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed collision issues with Nyx’s Hecaton Shotgun skin.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Narvarr Prime Leg Armor clipping through Nyx’s Pasithea Skin skirt.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.2 + 25.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Nyx Aures Helmet Energy color persisting as default.
Fixed Nyx’s armband Energy color persisting as default. 
Fixed Nyx Prime / Nyx Immortal Skins forearm Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Nyx Graxx Helmet Energy color not applying.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Made some adjustments to a few arm Armour pieces on the Nyx Paristhea Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Impact Status and ragdolling breaking enemies out of Nyx’s Pacify effect before its Duration is up.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed parts of Nyx’s Absorb ability that weren’t applying Energy colors.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Absorb being affected by teammate damage when using the Assimilate Augment Mod.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Psychic Bolts ability sometimes going silent.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.7.0 + 24.7.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Nyx’s Psychic Bolts now have an instant recast which simply selects 6 new targets and despells on older targets automatically.

patchlogs.name: Equinox Prime: Hotfix 24.5.8 + 24.5.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control significantly hindering AI's actions in many cases leading to reduced or even non-existent capability.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.4 + 24.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixing sometimes seeing black squares when casting Nyx's Chaos ability.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Changed Limbo’s Stasis to no longer affect temporarily friendly enemies (Nyx’s Mind Control, Revenant’s Enthrall).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.9 + 24.2.9.1
patchlogs.changes: A typical day in the life of Nyx involves Mind Control

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.changes: Updated Nyx and Nyx Prime's Passive descriptions to more accurately entail her recently tweaked Passive.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes:
Lowered Nyx’s Abilities volume for less fatigue while using Abilities repeatedly.
Fixed Corpus Ospreys not following you closely anymore when under Nyx’s Mind Control ability.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Updated Nyx's Mind Control + Psychic Bolts and Titania's Lantern ability descriptions to better reflect their recent ability changes.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: The Profit-Taker - Update 24.2
patchlogs.changes:
Nyx's abilities have received an audio refresh 
Nyx's Passive now causes enemies to miss her more often. 
Nyx's last Passive was to randomly disarm enemies when hit by powers. Since her revisited kit depends on enemies effectively hitting each other, we changed the passive to make Nyx simply harder to hit.
Reminder: All damage inflicted to the target will apply once Nyx deactivates Mind Control, or when the Duration runs out. 
Better 'follow Nyx and attack enemies' AI pass.
Mind Control can now be cast while moving, and no longer halts Nyx in her tracks!
Nyx’s passive ability to make enemies miss will be deactivated when she is using Absorb, meaning no shot will be wasted!

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where using the Assimilate Ability Augment on Nyx will deactivate toggle sprint, and force the player to toggle again.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.changes: Chroma Morkai Skin by lukinu_uEquinox Divisa Skin by HitsuSan Equinox Megaera Skin by Vulbjorn, the graphical walrusGara Zamariu Skin by led2012 and daemonstarLimbo Graxx Skin by FavenNyx Ascophillia Skin by ErneixTitania Lympharis Skin by lukinu_uZephyr Graxx Skin by Faven

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Stalker and Zanuka unable to target players after being Enthralled by Revenant or Chaos'd by Nyx, even after Ability expires.
Fixed Nyx’s Chaos Sphere Augment being removed when another cast occurs.
Fixed Nyx’s Chaos Sphere Augment script error.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nyx’s Chaos Sphere Augment not always grabbing every enemy in its radius.
Fixed Nyx's Chaos illusions' Syandanas not applying the chosen Energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that could occur if two people managed to tether themselves together (Nyx Chaos or Radiation Status Effect on two Grineer Scorpions, two M-W.A.M. Brokers in the Index, etc).

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Nyx's special dealing more damage when shot up close to the enemy

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx Mind Controlled Shield Ospreys spawned from Corpus Tech and Attack Drones spawned from Fusion Moas not being friendly.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes:
Nyx Prime and Rhino Prime are back!
For the first time ever, the hypnotic Nyx Prime is leaving the Vault! Charging out beside her is Rhino Prime along with other high-demand Vaulted Prime Accessories, Prime Weapons and discounted Platinum.
Nyx Prime
Nyx Prime

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes: Nyx Aurelia Skin by Hitsu San

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control affecting the Stalker and causing him to walk around like he lost something.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Igaro Day of the Dead Syandana appearing offset when equipped on Excalibur, Nyx, Nyx Nemesis Skin, or Nyx Prime.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mutalist Alad V collar creating a headless Nyx if he collars your Warframe just after you Transferred to the Operator. Your Operator getting collared will now force you back into your Warframe.
Fixed a script error when casting Nyx’s Absorb ability.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an ‘Excalinyx’ appearing in the diorama of the Nyx Nemesis Complete Bundle.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes:
Adjusted the Nyx Carnifex Helmet and Skin colors to match original design. 
Nyx's Mind Control range reduced to 20 meters and is also removed on damage from Nyx in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Broca Syandana being bent while equipped on Nyx.
Fixed various Syandanas clipping through Nyx and Nyx Prime.
Potentially fixed a script error when using Nyx Prime’s Absorb ability.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Hotfix 21.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting Nyx’s Absorb or Banshee’s Soundquake when hitting an enemy with a "grappling hook weapon" allowing you to move around.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur Proto and Nyx Nemesis Skins have received the PBR treatment!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Edo Chest Piece sticking out on the Nyx Carnifex Skin. 
Fixed the Pakal right shoulder Armor clipping into Nyx’s arm. 
Fixed the Embolist chest piece clipping into the Nyx Immortal, Saikou, Athena, and Carnifex Skins.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx being able to sometimes cast Chaos on Mobile Defense terminals, causing it to spin around.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies affected by Nyx’s Chaos, Loki’s Radial Disarm, Naramon Mind Spike as well as Radiation procs not taking increased damage from faction damage Mods.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control FX lingering on Ramparts.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.changes: The Stalker can no longer apply Nyx's passive to disarm enemies hit with Absorb due to being so powerful it crashed your game. Stalker pls.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Nyx’s Psychic Bolts.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ghostly Rampart remaining on an enemy if they exit the Rampart while under Nyx’s Mind Control.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.additions: Nyx Ampulex Helmet by Vulbjorn, the walrus rider.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 20.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Scavenger Ospreys summoned by Nekros/manipulated by Nyx/other abilities consuming loot (they ignore it now when ‘under the influence’).

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ospreys initiating their Ambulas hacking while being Mind Controlled by Nyx.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed becoming invincible after casting Nyx’s Absorb with Assimilate equipped and then Transferring to the Operator.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Nyx's Assimilate Augment for Absorb no longer Absorbs Friendly Fire.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed HUD buffs trying to show 1,000,000 as 1e+03K instead of 1M (e.g. Nyx Absorb when full).

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Mucusk Syandana not sitting properly on Nyx and any of her Skins.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Nyx's Psychic Daggers now only seek target under reticule. If no target is found, they will fire off in a random direction in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control not properly affecting Shield Drones, and resulted in the Drones wandering off on their own.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Assimilate Augment not allowing teammates to charge you up by fire absorption.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.changes: Improved visibility during Nyx's Absorb ability.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed deactivated underground Turrets in the Grineer Fortress being affected by abilities (Nyx’ Mind Control, etc) and causing a weird visual FX.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.4
patchlogs.fixes: Nyx Mind Control

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed pixelated/jagged textures on the Nyx Saikou Skin and Helmet.
Fixed screen blur & color correction remaining when you use Transference while in Nyx’s Absorb with the Assimilate Augment equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.11.0+19.11.0.1

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Nyx's Mind Control

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Nyx Graxx Skin and Helmet by Faven_PS

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error related to Nyx Prime’s Chaos ability.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’ Chaos and Rhino’s Iron Skin causing a script error upon cast.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.
Increased visibility of Nyx's psychic daggers in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed large frame-time spikes caused by Nyx’ Chaos.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.changes: Moved Nyx’ Absorb damage counter up to the buff notification area (like Equinox' Maim damage counter).

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.changes: Corrected the Ducat pricing for Nyx Prime Systems and Volt Prime Chassis, they were using the common sell price when they are uncommon drops.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed getting stuck in Nyx’s Absorb bubble while the ability is deactivated. 
Fixed being able to roll with Nyx’s Assimilate Augment active by binding a dedicated roll key (not sprint/roll).

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.4
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the Porta Armor positions on Nyx’s Nemesis skin.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!)
patchlogs.changes:
Nyx Prime, Scindo Prime and Hikou Prime have entered the Prime Vault and their Relics are no longer obtainable in the game. If you already wield the power of these Primes, they will remain in your Inventory. If you already hold Relics in your inventory that house these Primes, they will remain in your inventory and you may continue to play them.
the Nyx Prime Neuroptics will be replaced with Vauban Prime Neuroptics and Scindo Prime Blade will be replaced with Nikana Prime Blade.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Absorb camera FX remaining after a host migration.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Nyx
Nyx’s Mind Control duration reduced in Conclave.
Increased minimum explosive damage of Nyx’s Absorb in Conclave.
Removed two small sections on Nyx Prime that were un-tintable.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx's’ passive attempting to disarm already disarmed enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix: Lunaro 5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Nyx Prime textures are per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/656246-nyx-prime-mag-prime-texture-errors/

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed dots on the back of Nyx’s Nemesis skin not reflecting energy color.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.6
patchlogs.changes: •    Restored more detail in Nyx Prime’s textures.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.5

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.4 Operation Rathuum.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes: we've added PBR Upgrades on Nyx Prime, Ember Prime, Rhino Prime, and Excalibur Prime!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed Clients seeing the Host cast Nyx’s Absorb on the ground when she is actually in mid-air.
•    Fixed Client projectiles not registering in certain areas on larger Nyx Absorb bubbles.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Nyx can no longer alt fire while in Absorb in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Palatine Rhino, Nemesis Nyx, and The Corpus have new Profile Icons!
Nyx’s Mind Control and Chaos now have diminishing returns against boss-type enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies under the influence of Nyx’s Mind Control taking less damage at the end then they would take outside of it, as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/345656-mind-controlled-enemies-take-less-damage-at-the-end/

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies affected by Nyx’s Mind Control taking less damage at the end as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/345656-mind-controlled-enemies-take-less-damage-at-the-end/

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Nyx

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an inconsistent visual FX from the explosion created by Nyx’s Absorb.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream

patchlogs.name: Update 17.12.0

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed holograms created by Nyx’s Chaos becoming frozen as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/539097-are-nyx-holograms-supposed-to-be-frozen/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx's Chaos Sphere augment not working at all.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Nyx will now drop the Cephalon when using Absorb.
Nyx’s Chaos no longer has a cooldown, and enemies affected by Chaos cannot be stunned by additional casts.
Nyx's Psychic Bolts now have a chance to Radiation Proc enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players being unable to detonate grenade weapons while in Nyx’s Absorb as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/500071-nyx-absorb-not-letting-you-detonate-nades-while-channeling/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Absorb not shielding Sentinels from AoE damage occurring from within the Absorb bubble.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Nyx can walk while in an Absorb button in certain Solo mission scenarios.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue preventing some abilities (such as Nyx’s Absorb or Banshee’s Sound Quake) from being deactivated using the Power Menu.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies under Nyx’s Mind Control or Chaos not properly attributing their kills to Nyx and Shared Experience to Nyx’s Squadmates.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes:
• Increased the energy drain of Nyx’s Absorb in Pvp.
• Nyx’s Mind Control no longer causes players to drop the Cephalon in Capture the Cephalon.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some AI behavioral problems caused by using Nyx’s Mind Control.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the range of Nyx’s Mind control in PvP.
Reduced duration of Nyx’s Mind Control in PvP

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes:
This helmet is worn by Nyx, increases velocity of parkour maneuvers with a drain on Shields.
Nyx's Psychic Bolts speed has been increased and lifetime decreased in PvP.
Targets under Nyx’s mind control can no longer damage her in PvP.
Nyx’s mind control duration and range reduced in PvP.
Nyx's Absorb damage has been increased in PvP.
Nyx Prime base shield increased from 100 to 125.
Nyx Prime base armor increased from 15 to 50.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.changes: Nyx’s Chaos Sphere Augment FX has been made more visible.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control removing armor from enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Nyx

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes:
Players under control of Nyx’s Mind Control or Chaos will no longer see the FX on their Warframe.
Updated some textures on the Nemesis Nyx skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.4 + 16.4.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Added a stagger to Nyx’s Mind Control and Chaos ability in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Nyx and Nyx Prime are now usable in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an error that would occur when using Nyx’s Absorb.
Fixed Nyx’s Chaos sometimes ending early when a target under Chaos dies.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect armor locations on Nyx Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nyx’s Chaos causing Hives in Hive Infestation to become invincible one Chaos expires.
Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control causing Brood Mother Maggots to attack enemies after Mind Control ends.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.8
patchlogs.changes: Players can no longer gain energy while in Nyx’s Absorb or Mesa’s Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.5
patchlogs.changes: Nyx’s Mind Control is now a toggable ability.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker, Nyx’s Psychic Bolts, and Limbo’s Cataclysm affecting enemies that are immune to Tenno abilities.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Absorb not playing the end explosion animation.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Capture targets are now immune to Nyx’s Mind Control.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Enemies targeted by Nyx’s Mind Control no longer take friendly damage until the duration of the ability ends, at which point all accumulated damage to the target is applied at once.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Buzlok Rifle shots not adding damage to an ally using Nyx's Absorb.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.8.1
patchlogs.additions: Added Nyx Prime to the Codex (in place of ol' goldless Nyx).

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.additions: Nyx Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime have emerged in the Void! Visit the Void today to begin your hunt for the latest Prime gear. See here for the starting location of this new content that will be updated as it's discovered: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/172911-prime-gear-drop-locations/
patchlogs.changes:
Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime:
Nyx Prime and the newest Prime Gear!
Manipulator of minds, Nyx Prime inflicts mass hysteria as she bolts into Prime Access.
Get Nyx Prime Access now and make the newest Primes yours 
including Nyx Prime, Hikou Prime and Scindo Prime. Plus, stock up on discounted Platinum and get Exclusive Gear available only through Prime Access!
Reach into enemy consciousness and dominate with Nyx Prime, the newest addition to the ranks of elite Prime Warframes.
Modify your Warframe with Targis Prime Armor and the Vala Sugatra Prime. Add Exclusive Nyx Prime Avatars to your online presence! Speed up your in-game progress with 90-Day Affinity and Credit Boosters.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Nyx’s Absorb not properly costing 7/6/5/4 energy a second.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.5.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Nyx ability Mods not being properly granted after buying/crafting the frame.
Fixed an issue with Nyx's Absorb being useable during bleedout.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.changes: • Nyx’s Absorb has had it’s passive energy drain significantly reduced from 10 energy per second to 4 energy per second, and instead now has an energy drain based on incoming damage. This drain is 8 energy per 1000 damage. These drainage values are affected with the use of mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.1.4
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the sound effects on Nyx's Absorb.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Illiac Chest piece clipping into Ember, Nyx, and Mirage frames.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx, Banshee, and Hyrdoid's toggle-able powers being broken by pause menu.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a case in Nyx's Mind Control that could cause power-in-use on clients.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx being able to absorb inordinate amounts of damage by toggling Absorb extremely quickly.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Client's getting stuck in Nyx's Absorb pose while in pre-death.

patchlogs.name: 13.9.0 + 13.9.0.1: The Venka
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the alt fire on the Mutalist Quanta being duplicated by Nyx's Absorb ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.8.5
patchlogs.fixes:
* Fixed lingering Absorb effects after Nyx has bled-out.
* Fixed a script error with Nyx's Chaos that would cause a power-in-use bug.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.8.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an instance of Client's playing as Nyx being able to run around with Absorb active, if the power was activated right at the moment the player was knocked down.
Fixed an issue with Nyx's Absorb visual effects not disappearing for other players if Nyx dies while casting and then bleeds out.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.7.2
patchlogs.changes: Made Nyx's absorb resist magnetic damage so that you can't generate endless damage by chaining absorbs.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes self-inflicted death wounds being caused by throwing Glaives through Volt or Nyx's energy shields/bubbles.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the positioning of Chest Armor on Ember, Banshee, Valkyr, Zephyr, Vauban, Saryn, and Nyx.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.changes:
Both toggling changes to Nyx and Banshee will give players more freedom instead of being locked in place while the rest of your team runs around.  It should also add a nice element of resource management to both Warframes, rather than being stuck in place at the cost of X energy.
Increased the visual effects limit for Nyx's Absorb ability to account for duration extending Mods.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with players being able to move around while using Nyx's Absorb ability under certain circumstances

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed clipping issues Nyx's Noble rifle idle animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx parts not being received at mission end with Phorid.

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes: Improved sounds for Nyx’s Psychic Bolts.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Updated effects on Nyx’s Mind Control ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.1.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Nyx’s Absorb will now go affect enemies behind walls or cover.
Fixed Nyx’s absorb not doing damage to Infested Crawlers and Chargers.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.3: Hotter Than Ruk’S Guns!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx being immune to Shield Damage after using Absorb.Fixed Players potentially taking shield damage when Trinity has Blessed them.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Injury Immunity fixes for Nyx when in Absorb.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: Fixed some issues related to Nyx’s Mind Control ability where brainwashed AI didn’t always attack enemies as intended

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.7.1: Double Resource Weekend!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Torid and Nyx’s Absorb causing a game hang.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.6.0: The Vectis!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control and Chaos abilities making the targets not behave in a proper manner. Mind Control was not having enemies aggressively attack their own, and Chaos was making the player a target over enemies. The affected targets will now properly perceive their targets.
Fixed Sentinels hitting themselves when firing inside Nyx's Absorb bubble.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where enemy Shield Osprey drones would shield friendly enemies controlled by Nyx or Nekros.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.8
patchlogs.changes: Nyx: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/102833-nyx-98-feedback-thread/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Nyx's Chaos now only stuns bosses, not make them murder their subordinates

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Prevent being able to revive enemy capture target while he is being affected by Nyx's mind control.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed HUD breaking when reviving capture target affected with Nyx's mind control.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.4: Double Affinity Weekend!
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for HUD breaking when reviving capture target affected with Nyx’s “Mind Control”.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability effects for Nyx to be consistent on host/client both in terms of what is created and what colour it is.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.2: Tenno Reinforcement
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ammo not being consumed on some weapons when shooting Nyx’s absorb.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed shields not replenishing if damaged while using Nyx's Absorb

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Fix for Nyx Power in Use bug (maybe time for a Livestream rematch!).

patchlogs.name: 8.0.5: It's Getting Hot(Fix) In Here
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ash Shuriken and Nyx Psychic Bolts not functioning correctly on clients

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.3: Some Like It Hotter!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx Absorb not working, resulting in "Power in Use" bug.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.changes: Nyx's Chaos power now has a timer.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Apex particles that would remain on ragdolls after using Nyx's Mind Control power.
Fixed Nyx's armband FX showing up with projectors.

patchlogs.name: Update 7 - "stormbringer"
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Nyx Mind Control being flagged as "in use" if target dies.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.5 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes:
Excalibur Radial Javelin + Nyx Absorb no longer kills nearby Clients.
Log file should no longer receive error spam when using Nyx.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.4 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: removed unwanted background sound effect attached to Nyx

patchlogs.name: Update 6.3 - "make Love, Not War(Frame)"
patchlogs.fixes: Nyx's mind control visual effect now lasts the same duration as the power itself

patchlogs.name: Update 6: Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Nyx, Frost and Excalibur Alt Helmet changes

patchlogs.name: Update 6 - "New Stompin’ Grounds"
patchlogs.additions: Nyx! A psychic-based Warframe named by our Design Council!
